scripts.test:aerobics: npm run test:db:reset && vitest run src/modules/aerobics/aerobics.test.ts --silent
scripts.test:analytics: npm run test:db:reset && vitest run src/modules/analytics/analytics.test.ts --silent
scripts.test:exercises: npm run test:db:reset && vitest run src/modules/exercises/exercises.test.ts --silent
scripts.test:oauth: npm run test:db:reset && vitest run src/modules/oauth/oauth.test.ts --silent
